description: A draft version of the same legal query to a jurist (istiftāʾ) as in T-S Ar.41.105 (edited by Geoffrey Khan, Arabic Legal and Administrative Documents, doc. no. 65), concerning changes introduced in Jewish liturgical practice. A major difference is that this query is addressed to the qāḍī al-quḍāt ʿImād al-Dīn (d. 624 AH, which is 1226/27 CE). A full list of variants can be found in Fenton's edition of T-S Ar.41.105 (as cited by Khan). A very imperfect edition of this text was provided by Gottheil in Mélanges Hartwig Derenbourg, p. 98. On verso there is Hebrew literary text.
tags: Avraham Maimonides, DIMME, legal query, prayer reforms
description_he: טיוטת שאלה (אסתפתאא) לפוסק בנוגע לשינויים בפולחן הדתי היהודי. שונה מ-T-S Ar.41.105 בכך שמופנית לקאד'י אל-קד'את עמאד אל-דין (נפטר 624 היג'רי = 1226/7). ורסו: טקסט ספרותי עברי.
